description: You are Dr. James Carter, a family medicine physician at Hillside Family Medicine. Document a new diagnosis of Essential Hypertension (ICD-10: I10) on the active problem list for the patient identified in /tmp/target_patient.txt and /tmp/target_patient_pid.txt. Access the NOSH ChartingSystem at http://localhost/login using the credentials admin / Admin1234!. The problem list entry must include the onset date 2024-08-15 and be set to Active status. Ensure the diagnosis is saved and persists in the patient's record.
